title: Reports of Committees; Chairman to Sign
doc_html:
Rule 14.46.  Reports of Committees; Chairman to Sign

Each report of a committee shall be signed by the chairman thereof.

Mason's Manual:  Sec. 663-668

HR 8, 1974.
